headline: Is Cintas (CTAS) Fully Valued As Strong Earnings And 2027 Guidance Lift Sentiment?
summary: Cintas (CTAS) stock was in focus after fourth quarter and full year 2026 results exceeded market expectations, with record profitability metrics, broad-based segment growth and new fiscal 2027 revenue guidance. See our latest analysis for Cintas. The strong fourth quarter has been reflected in Cintas’ recent share price momentum, with a 1-day share price return of 4.36% and a 30-day share price return of 10.09%. However, the 1-year total shareholder return is down 9.26%, while the 5-year...

headline: Cintas (CTAS) Is Up 6.8% After Record FY26 Results And Higher FY27 Revenue Outlook - What's Changed
summary: Cintas Corporation has already reported fourth-quarter and full-year fiscal 2026 results, with quarterly revenue rising to US$2,905.20 million and net income reaching US$510.99 million, while full-year revenue climbed to US$11.26 billion and net income to US$2.00 billion. The company reinforced its growth ambitions by issuing fiscal 2027 revenue guidance of US$12.10 billion to US$12.25 billion, highlighting confidence in demand across its uniform and facility services offerings.
